text: The subject property’s current improvements are consistent with the zoning, market demand, and surrounding development patterns. The highest and best use of the site as currently improved is continued use as a multi-tenant commercial office building catering to medical, professional, and service-oriented tenants. The existing building configuration, adequate parking, and flexible suite layouts support ongoing multi-tenant occupancy, and no adverse site or location-specific conditions were observed that would suggest conversion to an alternative use. Based on current local and market conditions, the property’s continued use as a multi-tenant office building represents the highest and best use both as vacant and as currently improved.
